subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Hearken unto the call of the Wronged One, for verily He calleth thee from this exalted station, and His very hairs bear witness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن ان استمع ندآء المظلوم انه ینادیک من هذا المقام المرفوع و یشهد شعراته
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
